name: Intellia Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Intellia Therapeutics is a biopharmaceutical company developing CRISPR-based in vivo gene editing therapies for severe diseases, primarily hereditary angioedema (HAE) and transthyretin (ATTR) amyloidosis. Its lead candidates are lonvoguran ziclumeran (lonvo-z) for HAE and nexiguran ziclumeran (nex-z) for ATTR amyloidosis, currently in Phase 3 trials. The company also has earlier-stage programs and collaborations.

exposures.sentence: Intellia Therapeutics, Inc. ( we, us, our, Intellia, or the Company ) is a leading biopharmaceutical company focused on revolutionizing medicine leveraging CRISPR gene editing and other core technologies.

catalysts.event: Topline data from HAELO Phase 3 trial for lonvo-z
catalysts.sentence: We expect to report topline data from the HAELO Phase 3 trial by mid-2026.
We expect to ... submit a BLA to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration ( FDA ) in the second half of 2026.
We are preparing for an anticipated U.S. commercial launch of lonvo-z in the first half of 2027.

catalysts.event: Complete enrollment in MAGNITUDE-2 Phase 3 trial for nex-z (ATTRv-PN)
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete enrollment in MAGNITUDE-2 in the second half of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 7,000 patients in the U.S. are being treated for HAE.
tamClaims.sentence: It is estimated that approximately one in 50,000 people globally are affected by HAE, and approximately 7,000 patients in the U.S. are being treated for HAE.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 50,000 patients suffer from ATTRv worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: Estimates suggest that approximately 50,000 patients suffer from ATTRv worldwide.

tamClaims.claim: Between 250,000 and 500,000 people may suffer from ATTRwt with cardiomyopathy globally.
tamClaims.sentence: Recent estimates suggest that, globally, between 250,000 and 500,000 people may suffer from ATTRwt with cardiomyopathy ( ATTRwt-CM ).
